new_issues_this_run.description: code_analysis.monitoring='hardcoded' but should be 'none'. monitor.py has no gyroscopic precession domain. Our own detail_evidence confirms this. Inflates 'monitoring illusion' count in Part 4.6 statistics.
Summary finding omits the 37% value discrepancy. Readers scanning summary table miss the second independent failure.

suggested_patch.find: Units error: dome gives rad/s² (acceleration) not rad/s (velocity). Rate derived circularly from assumed dome parameters
suggested_patch.replace: Units error (rad/s² vs rad/s) and 37% value mismatch; no derivation connects dome geometry to the claimed number

new_issues_this_run.description: '39-domain' is a hardcoded count in detail_evidence that may drift if dome adds/removes monitoring domains. Should be softened to 'multi-domain'.
